_comment: Layer-2 routing tests for the book_generator_tom (TOM) setup. Each skill lists prompts that SHOULD route to it (should_fire) and prompts that must NOT (should_not_fire). The default runner is a deterministic nearest-description classifier over the SKILLS only (stdlib). Run: python tools/validate_claude_setup.py ../../book_generator_tom --route. Add --route-model to check against the real router.

should_fire: deploy the backend to the Hugging Face Space and push from inside hf_space
I changed config.yaml, run sync_to_space.sh and redeploy the Space
switch the app_file and rebuild the deployed Gradio space
should_not_fire: make the Braille domes taller and keep the tactile layers distinct
add a new nikud vowel-mark option to the disambiguation dropdown

should_fire: change the plate thickness and stroke height in config.yaml for printability
make the Braille domes taller so the tactile layers stay distinct
the STL layer heights look wrong, debug the page geometry and dimensions
should_not_fire: push the Gradio app to the Hugging Face Space after editing config
fix the skeletonization producing double lines in the DXF export

should_fire: add a new nikud vowel-mark option to the disambiguation dropdown
the Hebrew to Braille translation is wrong, check SPECIAL_REPLACEMENTS
update language_funcs and mirror the nikud keys in web/src/lib/nikud.js
should_not_fire: make the Braille domes taller for FDM printability
the PNG to DXF skeletonization is producing double lines

should_fire: the skeletonization is producing double lines in the DXF export
Stable Diffusion line-art generation then thinning to a single-stroke DXF
the DXF comes out empty after PNG conversion, debug image_funcs
should_not_fire: make the Braille domes taller and keep the layers tactilely distinct
push the Gradio app to the Hugging Face Space
